I hereby declare that I am a resident of NITC hostels/Quarters.

OR

I was a resident of NITC hostels/Quarters & has vacated the same on……….(strike whichever is not applicable). 



I also declare that in case I am applying for hostel/Quarters accommodation in future, I will inform the office of the DEAN(R&C) in writing.

“I hereby declare that the above furnished details are correct and in case of any details are found as wrong I undertake to payback amount to the institute.”



Name & Signature of project staff

Encl: 1.Copy of appointment/extension memorandum is enclosed for reference.

          2. HRA certificate is enclosed for reference.



It is confirmed that:

The tenure of the staff are verified and found to be correct as per the appointment/extension order

The Attendance status has been verified



Name & Signature of  PI/Guide/Mentor/Coordinator :                                    Recommendation of  HOD :

Note: (i) The attendance statement should reach R & C office on the first working day of next month.   

          (ii)  Please prepare separate statements for each category of staff on monthly basis.
